text: Tempat wisata alam yang bagus buat menumbuhkan kepercayaan diri pada anak
english_translation: A good nature tourist spot for building children's self-confidence
summary: This nature-based attraction offers activities designed to build self-confidence in children.

text:
Curug tilu leuwi opat merupakan sebuah tempat wisata rekreasi alam berupa air terjun yang sangat indah.
Terletak di wilayah kabupaten bandung barat, dan sangat mudah jika anda ingin menemukan lokasinya.
Biaya masuknya pun sangat terjangkau, dan anda bisa melihat pemandangan alam berupa air terjun yang sangat indah.
english_translation:
Curug Tilu Leuwi Opat is a beautiful natural recreational tourist destination featuring a waterfall.
It is located in the West Bandung regency and is very easy to find.
The entrance fee is very affordable, and you can enjoy the beautiful natural scenery of the waterfall.
summary: The Curug Tilu Leuwi Opat waterfall is an easily located and affordable natural attraction, where the primary activity is enjoying the scenic environment.

text:
Wisata alam kali ini menurut saya cukup bagus vieuwnya bwt foto2, liburan bersama keluarga sangat cocok tuk yg suka dgn alam, htm per/org 5rb, roda 4 5rb, roda 2 3rb
Jajanan juga standart ga main pukul.. hanya satu kekurangannya yaitu akses jalan menuju kesana masih rusak, klo naik motor harus hati2
english_translation:
This nature tour, in my opinion, has pretty good views for photos. It's very suitable for family vacations for those who love nature. The entrance fee is IDR 5,000 per person, IDR 5,000 for four-wheeled vehicles, and IDR 3,000 for two-wheeled vehicles.

The snacks are also standard and not overpriced. The only drawback is that the road leading there is still damaged. If you're riding a motorcycle, you need to be careful.
summary: This nature attraction, ideal for families and photography, offers reasonably priced snacks. The main drawback is poor accessibility due to a damaged access road, which requires caution, particularly for motorcyclists.

text: Sebelum ke curugnya, kita lewatin hutan pinus dulu yang jadi area untuk camping. Pemandangan menuju kebun teh sukawana. Ada monyet2 juga. Ada toilet dan warung, banyak spot foto. Disarankan untuk datang weekdays jika tidak ingin terlalu ramai banyak pengunjung.
english_translation: Before going to the waterfall, we pass through a pine forest that is also a camping area. The view leads to the Sukawana tea plantation. There are also monkeys. There are toilets and stalls, and many photo spots. It is recommended to come on weekdays if you don't want it to be too crowded with visitors.
summary: This attraction features a waterfall accessible via a pine forest that also serves as a camping area. The site provides facilities such as toilets, stalls, and designated photo spots. Activities include enjoying views of a tea plantation and observing monkeys, with a weekday visit recommended to avoid crowds.

text: Harga tiket masuknya tidak sesuai sama wahana di dalam, isinya cuman sedikit bahkan curugnya saja banyak sampah, untuk pemandian air panasnya terlalu mahal itu pun kotor, untuk foto pakai hp sendiri saja bayar :"). Tiap permainanya kemahalan. Saran, tempat di bersihkan wahananya tambahin dan jangan terlalu mahal
english_translation: The entrance ticket price doesn't match the attractions inside. There's very little to see, and even the waterfall is full of trash. The hot springs are too expensive and dirty. You even have to pay to take photos with your own phone. Every ride is overpriced. My suggestion is to clean the place, add more attractions, and don't be too expensive.
summary: The attraction offers poor value due to limited, overpriced activities and poorly maintained facilities, including a dirty waterfall and hot springs. The review highlights excessive costs, from a high entrance fee to additional charges for rides and taking personal photos.

text: Terdapat situ atau danau yang di sekeliling nya terdapat pedagang yang berjualan di atas perahu, pembeli/pengunjung bisa berjalan di tepi danau, di atas jembatan kayu, menaiki perahu, terdapat wahana nuansa Jepang, bisa sewa kimono atau busana Jepang bisa foto bareng cosplay samurai Jepang
english_translation: There is a lake or pond surrounded by vendors selling from their boats. Buyers/visitors can walk along the lake's edge, on wooden bridges, or take a boat ride. There are Japanese-themed attractions, and one can rent kimonos or Japanese attire, and take photos with Japanese samurai cosplayers.
summary: This attraction features a lake with a floating market that visitors can access by walking along pathways and bridges or by taking a boat ride. The site offers Japanese-themed activities, including the rental of traditional attire and opportunities for photos with cosplayers.

text: 582 anak tangga, tetapi Anda juga memiliki air terjun yang besar! Bawalah sesuatu untuk diminum dan dimakan, karena cukup mendaki! Anda bisa memasukkan kaki Anda ke dalam air untuk memulihkan diri. Sangat sepi, sedikit turis, dan beberapa monyet sebagai pelengkap. Banyak bersenang-senang!
english_translation: 582 steps, but you also have a huge waterfall! Bring something to drink and eat, as it's quite a climb! You can put your feet in the water to recover. Very quiet, few tourists, and some monkeys to complete the scene. Have lots of fun!
summary: This tourist attraction features a large waterfall accessible via a strenuous, 582-step climb. Visitors should bring their own food and water, as facilities are not mentioned. Activities at the quiet, uncrowded site include cooling off in the water and wildlife viewing.

text: Asri ...bisa bwt camp jg ..asik lah bikin acara d sini selain olahraga bwt sehat jg ..anak anak pun bebas beraktifitas ..curug nya masih asri,alangkah lebih baik d kelola bwt tempat menunggu ..ya seperti saung saung ..tp enak loh hiking d sini
english_translation: Asri... can also be used for camping... it's fun to hold events here, besides exercising for health... the children are also free to be active... the waterfall is still natural, it would be even better if it were managed for a waiting area... like gazebos... but hiking here is nice
summary: This natural site is suitable for various recreational activities, including hiking, camping, and family events. While it offers a pleasant hiking experience and a natural waterfall, it lacks developed facilities such as gazebos or managed waiting areas.

text:
Tempat sedikit kurang Terawat,  akses masuk jln sedikit jelek .  Papan petunjuk kurang jelas dan kecil terlebih petunjuk lokasi berada tepat di tikungan

FYI, ada 2 jalan masuk. lewat gua pawon atau langsung ke stone garden
english_translation:
The place is a bit less maintained, the road access is a bit bad. The signs are unclear and small, especially the location sign which is right at the turn.

FYI, there are 2 entrances. via Pawon Cave or directly to Stone Garden.
summary: Access to this poorly maintained attraction is challenging due to bad roads and small, unclear signage. Visitors should note there are two entrances: one via Pawon Cave and another directly to the Stone Garden.

text: tempatnya bagus, tapi sudah tidak terawat. arena bermain nya sudah banyak karat dan terbengkalai. untuk curugnya sendiri tergolong lumayan bagus. airnya fresh, pemandangan nya oke. cuman kalo bulan puasa tempatnya sepi bangettt~~ sebenernya banyak yg jualan makanan tp pada tutup. biaya masuknya 15k/org sama parkir motor 2k
english_translation: The place is nice, but it's no longer well-maintained. The playground is very rusty and abandoned. The waterfall itself is quite good. The water is fresh, and the view is okay. It's just that during Ramadan, the place is extremely quiet~~ Actually, there are many food vendors, but they are all closed. The entrance fee is 15k/person and motorcycle parking is 2k.
summary: The main attraction is a pleasant waterfall, though the site itself is poorly maintained. Facilities include a derelict, rusty playground and food vendors that may be closed seasonally, such as during Ramadan. Access requires a 15k entrance fee per person and a 2k fee for motorcycle parking.

text: Tempat yg enak buat santai, buat istirahat dari ke sibukan sehari-hari.. kalo udah d sini males pulang,, lupa waktu, apa lagi kalo kesini nya bareng keluarga, d jamin bikin lupa waktu
english_translation: A great place to relax, to rest from the hustle and bustle of everyday life. When you're here, you won't want to go home, you'll lose track of time, especially if you come here with family. Guaranteed to make you lose track of time.
summary: This attraction is described as a highly relaxing and immersive destination, particularly suitable for family visits to escape the stress of daily life. The review does not contain information regarding the site's specific accessibility or facilities.

text: Taman bunga nya tdk terlalu luas tp bnyk spot untk foto2, cocok buat pasangan yg ingin romantis2an, tiket masuk weekend 15rb/org,,parkir mobil 10rb, tmpat parkirnya sempit jd klo dtng agak siang kebagian parkir yg d seberang jln, klo bawa kamera selain kamera hp kena pajak 25rb - 50rb/ kamera.
english_translation: The flower garden isn't too big, but there are many photo spots. It's suitable for couples who want to be romantic. Weekend entrance ticket is 15,000 IDR per person, car parking is 10,000 IDR. The parking lot is narrow, so if you come a bit later, you'll get parking across the street. If you bring a camera other than a phone camera, there's a tax of 25,000 - 50,000 IDR per camera.
summary: This small, romantic flower garden offers numerous photo opportunities, making it ideal for couples. The site has a narrow, limited parking lot with additional space across the street. Visitors should note that there are fees for entrance and parking, as well as a separate tax for using non-phone cameras.

text:
Kedua kalinya ke Sanghyang Heuleut.. Pertama tahun 2014 dan sekarang 2019.
Banyak perubahan terutama trek menuju lokasi akibat Banjir Bandang Tahun 2017.
Sudah banyak warung dan penyewaan pelampung...
Semoga tetap terjaga keasriannya
english_translation:
Second time to Sanghyang Heuleut.. The first was in 2014 and now in 2019.
Many changes, especially the path to the location due to the Flash Flood in 2017.
There are already many stalls and life jacket rentals...
Hopefully, its natural beauty will be preserved.
summary: The attraction features an altered access path and now provides on-site facilities, including stalls and life jacket rentals for water-based activities.

text: Tempatnya dingin masih asri bgt. Alhamdulillah pas kesana ga rame sama sekali padahal kesana pas libur long weekend
english_translation: The place is still very cool and pristine. Alhamdulillah, when I went there, it wasn't crowded at all, even though I went during a long weekend holiday.
summary: The pristine attraction was surprisingly uncrowded and accessible, even during a long weekend holiday.

text:
Sekarang banyak sekali pedagang yang agak memaksa dalam menawarkan dagangan.

Saya tidak nyaman selalu diikuti pedagang saat sedang menikmati pemandangan atau berfoto.
Kadang juga menawarkan bantuan untuk menfoto secara gratis, tapi salah satu strategi agar bisa menawarkan dagangannya.
english_translation:
Nowadays, many traders are rather pushy in offering their wares.
I feel uncomfortable being constantly followed by traders while enjoying the scenery or taking photos.
Sometimes they also offer to take photos for free, but it's a strategy to be able to offer their merchandise.
summary: The reviewer found it difficult to enjoy activities like sightseeing and photography due to persistent and pushy traders who constantly followed them to sell merchandise.

text: Masuk sini tiket masuk bisa ditukar jadi jus atau kopi. Tempatnya bagus, ada hewan-hewan dan bunga disusun rapi. Spot foto bagus semua. Jajanan di kapal terapung uang diganti koin dulu. Pedagangnya jualan di kapal kecil. Banyak pilihan makanannya.
english_translation: Come in here, the entrance ticket can be exchanged for juice or coffee. The place is nice, with animals and flowers neatly arranged. All the photo spots are good. For snacks on the floating boat, money is exchanged for coins first. The vendors sell from small boats. There are many food options.
summary: The attraction's entrance ticket is redeemable for a complimentary drink. The site features well-arranged animal and flower displays, offering numerous photo opportunities. A key activity is purchasing snacks from a unique floating market, which requires using a special coin-based payment system to buy from vendors on small boats.

text: Udara sejuk, kalau kebetulan dicurug cimahi ini anda bisa melihat banyak monyet, harus hati hati,jangan mengganggunya.
english_translation: Cool air, if you happen to be at Cimahi waterfall, you can see many monkeys, you must be careful, don't disturb them.
summary: Visitors to Cimahi waterfall can engage in wildlife viewing, with the review highlighting the presence of numerous monkeys and advising caution to avoid disturbing them.

text: Curugnya keren dan airnya bersihh. Harga tiketnya 15.000/orang kalo mau ke curug yg di atasnya bayar lagi 10.000/orang tapi worth it bgtt. Nyobain jalan ke belakang kaya lagi di negeri dongeng xixi keren pokoknya👍🏼
english_translation: The waterfall is cool and the water is clean. The ticket price is 15,000/person. If you want to go to the waterfall above, you have to pay another 10,000/person, but it's totally worth it. Trying to walk behind it felt like being in a fairy tale, lol, it's really cool 👍🏼
summary: This attraction features a clean waterfall that visitors can walk behind. Access requires a 15,000 entrance fee, with an additional, recommended 10,000 fee to visit an upper waterfall.

text:
Parkiranya kurang luas,
Dan kurang di rawat
Kalo di foto foto bagus.
Tapi aslinya kurang kerawat
Karena naek turun nya emng engap bgt sih
Kedepanya mungkin ada lift otomatis
Biar wisatawanya banyak yang mau

Karena mereka hanya foto dari atas ajah
Gk mau ke bawah
english_translation:
The parking is not very spacious,
And not well maintained.
It looks good in photos.
But in reality, it's not well cared for
Because the ups and downs are really tiring.
In the future, perhaps there will be an automatic lift
So that more tourists will want to visit.

Because they only take photos from above
They don't want to go down.
summary: This attraction has significant accessibility issues due to strenuous, steep terrain, which often limits visitor activity to taking photos from the top. The facilities are also poor, featuring a small, ill-maintained parking area and a lack of an accessibility lift.

text: Kalau mau foto tempat ini bisa jadi salah satu pilihan destinasi, waktu yg tepat ketika ada sinar matahari, kalau pas mendung kurang menurut saya, saya suka koleksi anggrek disini, bisa liat di foto2 ini
english_translation: If you want to take photos, this place can be one of the destination options. The right time is when there is sunlight; if it's cloudy, it's less ideal in my opinion. I like the orchid collection here, you can see it in these photos.
summary: This destination is suitable for photography, particularly in sunny conditions, and features an orchid collection for viewing.

text: cukup baik, lingkungan alam masi asri, cocok untuk tempat menghilangkan kejenuhan, utk kebersihan perlu ditingkatkan lagi karena banyaknya sampah yang ada di dalam tempat wisata mudah dijumpai. overall cukup baik, next time kembali lagi
english_translation: Quite good, the natural environment is still beautiful, suitable for a place to relieve boredom. For cleanliness, it needs to be improved again because a lot of trash is easily found within the tourist spot. Overall, it's quite good, will come back next time.
summary: The attraction offers a beautiful natural environment suitable for relaxation, but its appeal is diminished by a noticeable lack of cleanliness and the presence of litter.

text: Ok banget sih! Bersih dan terawat. Banyak spot foto lucu juga yg bikin dia beda sama hutan pinus lainnya. Ada shuttle juga untuk kembali ke tempat parkir. Harga tiket masuk standar, tapi sayang ada bbrp spot di dalam yg kalo mau masuk harus bayar lagi 😅 …
english_translation: Really good! Clean and well-maintained. Lots of cute photo spots that make it different from other pine forests. There's also a shuttle to get back to the parking lot. The entrance ticket price is standard, but unfortunately there are some spots inside that require an additional payment to enter 😅 …
summary: This well-maintained attraction offers numerous photo opportunities and provides a shuttle service for convenient access back to the parking lot. While there is a standard entrance fee, visitors should be aware that some spots within the site require an additional payment for entry.

text: Tempat nya bagus trek nya klo hujan hati"aga licin  dan bnyak monyet ya juga
english_translation: The place is good, the track is a bit slippery when it rains, be careful, and there are also many monkeys.
summary: This attraction features a walking track that becomes slippery in wet weather, requiring caution. The site is also characterized by the presence of numerous monkeys.

text: Bosan dengan kepenatan kota. coba ke cikole bnyak pemainan dan bsa menginap disini. Mau mkan bsa harga mkan terjaungkau tiket juga bisa di tukar makan atau permainan ya gengs.. Mau acara getring pas bgt dsni. Tmpat teduh aman dan berkumpul dngan bahagia😉 …
english_translation: Tired of the city's exhaustion. Try Cikole, there are many games and you can stay here. You can eat at affordable prices, and tickets can also be exchanged for food or games, guys. If you want to have a gathering event, this is the perfect place. A shady, safe place to gather happily 😉…
summary: This tourist attraction offers numerous games, accommodation, and affordable dining. The venue is suitable for group gatherings and features a system where entrance tickets can be redeemed for food or activities.

text:
Tempat yang luar biasa keren, spot foto melimpah, kalo belajar batuan juga bisa, climbing juga bisa (katanya..)
Cuma ya masuknya ada 2 kali tiket, tiket pertama kurang jelas untuk apa.
Tapi untuk lokasinya, recommended sekali lah kalo pecinta wisata alam bebatuan.
english_translation:
An incredibly cool place, abundant photo spots, you can also study rocks, and you can also climb (they say...).
It's just that there are two entrance fees, the first ticket is unclear what it's for.
But for the location, it's highly recommended for nature lovers who enjoy rocky landscapes.
summary: This natural site, recommended for lovers of rocky landscapes, provides opportunities for photography, geological study, and potential rock climbing. Visitors should be aware that access requires a confusing two-part entrance fee.

text: Masuk dengan tiket Rp 50.000 dapat untuk masuk dan menikmati wisata baru, serta dapat minuman ‘selamat datang’. Untuk menyeberang Jembatan wajib membayar Rp 15.000,- atau naik mobil yang mengantar ke lokasi dibawah. Yang sedikit memicu andrenalin karena sebagian jalan memakai besi lubang yang dapat melihat kebawah
english_translation: Entry with a ticket of Rp 50,000 includes admission to the new tourist attraction and a 'welcome' drink. Crossing the bridge costs Rp 15,000 or you can take the car service to the location below. The adrenaline-pumping part is that some of the path is made of grated metal, allowing you to see down.
summary: The attraction's Rp 50,000 admission fee includes a welcome drink. For an additional cost, visitors can cross a bridge with a see-through grated metal path, or alternatively, use a car service for transport to the lower area.

text: Kalo mau kesini jarak mulai dari tempat parkir lumayan jauh,saha lupa itu tempat parkir teh pintu pertama kalo gak salah,bayar parkir dan helm sekitar 10000ribu dan bayar tiket masuk 10000/15000an per orang,dan bisa menyewa jasa tour gate biar tidak tersesat.
english_translation: If you want to come here, the distance from the parking lot is quite far. I forgot, the parking lot is the first entrance, if I'm not mistaken. Parking and helmet fees are around 10,000 rupiah, and entrance tickets are 10,000/15,000 per person. You can also hire a tour guide to avoid getting lost.
summary: The attraction is located a considerable distance from its parking lot, which serves as the main entrance. Visitors should expect to pay separate fees for parking, helmet rental, and admission. For assistance with navigation, tour guides are available for hire.

text: Tempat wisata mantab , ada pemandian air panas dan pemandangan yg bagus
english_translation: Great tourist spot, has hot springs and good views
summary: The tourist site features hot springs and is noted for its excellent views.

text:
tempat yang pas untuk kegiatan berkelompok seperti family gathering, employee gathering, dll.

arena outbond luas, paket sudah termasuk makan siang, tapi tempat jajan juga tersedia.

sayang mushola nya kecil, ada masjid tapi cukup jauh ke tempat parkiran.
english_translation:
The perfect place for group activities such as family gatherings, employee gatherings, etc.

Spacious outdoor arena, package includes lunch, but snack stalls are also available.

Unfortunately, the prayer room is small, and there is a mosque but it's quite far from the parking lot.
summary: This venue is ideal for group activities, offering a spacious outdoor area with food options that include package lunches and snack stalls. While prayer facilities are available, the on-site room is noted as small, and the mosque is located inconveniently far from the parking area.

text: Harga tiket 40rb/orang sudah termasuk kendaraan, disetiap tikungan terdapat petugas keamanan, sepanjang jalan dr mulai jalan Tangkuban Parahu bersih, tidak terlihat sampah. Harga souvernir bisa ditawar(asal pinter tapi jangan sampai dibanting, kasian).naik kuda 50rb/2 orang. Untuk makanan dan minuman mendingan bekel aja.
english_translation: Ticket price is 40,000 IDR per person, which includes the vehicle. There are security guards at every turn. The road from Tangkuban Parahu is clean, no trash is visible. Souvenir prices are negotiable (if you're good at it, but don't bargain too hard, it's a pity). Horse riding is 50,000 IDR for 2 people. For food and drinks, it's better to bring your own.
summary: The site is accessible by vehicle for a 40,000 IDR entrance fee, featuring clean roads and security personnel. Horse riding is available for an additional cost, and while souvenirs are sold at negotiable prices, visitors are advised to bring their own food and drinks.

text: Tempatnya menyenangkan, banyak spot buat ambil foto, keindahan alam yang disajikan sangat memanjakan mata, ada fasilitas outbound berupa flying fox, areanya luas tapi tak usah khawatir jika sudah di bawah nanti ada shuttle ke atas ke tempat parkir
english_translation: The place is pleasant, with many spots for taking photos. The natural beauty presented is very pleasing to the eye. There are outbound facilities like a flying fox, and the area is vast, but don't worry, once you're down there, there's a shuttle to take you back up to the parking lot.
summary: This scenic attraction features adventure activities like a flying fox and is noted for its vast size. For accessibility, a shuttle service is available to transport visitors from the lower areas of the site back to the parking lot.

text: Bagus tempatnya,bayarnya cukup terjangkau.Saran jangan ajak ortu yang sudah sepuh kasian karena banyak jalanan yg naik.Jadi sistemnya kalo disini itu bayar sekali di depan habis itu kalo di dal mau masuk wahana yg lain juga bayar tapi banyak yg free juga kok.Overall oke tempatnyaaa.
english_translation: The place is nice and the price is quite affordable. My suggestion is not to bring elderly parents, as it's a pity because there are many uphill paths. So the system here is you pay once at the entrance, and then if you want to enter other attractions inside, you still have to pay, but many are free too. Overall, the place is okay.
summary: This affordable attraction features numerous uphill paths, making it challenging for visitors with limited mobility. An initial entrance fee is required, and while many activities inside are free, some specific attractions necessitate separate payment.

text: Pertama kesini awal pembukaan dan hampir tiap sabtu dan minggu kesini, msh sepi dan sengaja cari hotel yg dkt sini biar minggu paginya bs olah raga disini.. Dan berjalan waktu ternyata tambah rame dan tambah banyak arena lain... Makanan nya pun tambah banyay
english_translation: First came here at the opening and almost every Saturday and Sunday came here, still quiet and intentionally looked for a hotel nearby so that on Sunday mornings could exercise here. And as time went on, it turned out to be more crowded and more other attractions... The food also increased a lot.
summary: Once a quiet location suitable for exercise, this attraction has become increasingly crowded over time, now offering a greater number of attractions and a wide variety of food options.

text:
Lembang emng surganya tmpat wisata ya gx ngerti lg bagus2 smua gx ada yg mengecewakan. Buat yg maubke sini tiket msuk 15k. Ini tuh tmpat camping dan nginep gitu. Ada outbound cafe dan penangkaran rusa. Next pengen nyoba stay di sini hehe.
Jgn lupa follow ig saya @randyndie
english_translation:
Lembang is indeed a paradise for tourist spots, I don't know what else to say, all of them are good, none are disappointing. For those who want to come here, the entrance ticket is 15k. This is a place for camping and staying overnight. There's an outbound area, a cafe, and a deer conservation. Next time I want to try staying here, hehe.
Don't forget to follow my Instagram @randyndie
summary: This Lembang tourist attraction, accessible for a 15k entrance fee, offers facilities for camping and overnight stays. Key activities and amenities mentioned include an outbound area, a cafe, and a deer conservation.

text:
Mampir disini kalau ke Lembang. Tidak jauh dari floating market.
Kebun bunga Begonia benar-benar memanjakan mata. Bunga dimana-mana.
Parkir gampang, fasilitas juga cukup baik. Toilet bersih dan mushola ada disini. Tempat ngemil juga ada.
Yang jelas sih untuk selfie-selfie disini tempatnya.
english_translation:
Stop by here if you're going to Lembang. Not far from the Floating Market.
The Begonia flower garden is truly a feast for the eyes. Flowers everywhere.
Parking is easy, and the facilities are quite good. The toilets are clean and there's a prayer room here. There are also places to snack.
The main thing is, this is a great place for selfies.
summary: This easily accessible flower garden in Lembang features convenient parking and well-maintained facilities, including clean toilets, a prayer room, and snack areas. The main activities are enjoying the extensive floral displays and taking photographs.

text:
This place is awesome...
Asli keren banget, pemandangannya keren banget.
Batu-batunya banyak dan oh iya disini panas bangett temans kalo siang, karena tempatnya terbuka... yuks main ke Stone garden... aku kesini dari Bandung naik kereta lokal bayarnya Rp 5.000 trus, naik ojek online. Tiket masuknya Rp 8.000
english_translation:
This place is awesome...
It's really cool, the scenery is amazing.
There are many rocks and oh yes, it's very hot here during the day, friends, because it's an open space... let's go play at Stone Garden... I came here from Bandung by local train, it cost Rp 5,000, then I took an online motorbike taxi. The entrance ticket is Rp 8,000.
summary: Stone Garden is a scenic, open-air attraction featuring a rocky landscape, which can get very hot during the day. The site is accessible from Bandung by local train and online motorbike taxi, with an entrance fee of Rp 8,000.

text:
recomended buat yg suka tracking, seru jg buat main air deket curugnya..
bagusnya kalo kesini hrs bener2 sehat biar kuat sampai curugnya apalagi pulangnya mantepp poll di kaki..
Cuman kmrn air terjunnya keliatan coklat sebagian trs banyak sampah di pinggiran kali bawahnya, kalobisa dirawat dan diperbagus lg tempat istirahatnya
english_translation:
Recommended for those who like trekking, it's also fun to play in the water near the waterfall.
It's best to come here when you're really healthy so you can make it to the waterfall, especially on the way back, your legs will be tired.
However, yesterday the waterfall looked partly brown and there was a lot of trash on the edges of the river below, if it could be maintained and the resting areas improved.
summary: This attraction offers trekking and water activities at a waterfall, but access involves a strenuous hike suitable only for visitors in good physical condition. The site's facilities, such as resting areas, require improvement, and it suffers from poor maintenance, with issues of litter and discolored water noted.

text: Harga worth it dengan segala keindahan alam di dalamnya, tempatnya luas banget, sejuk adem walau matahari muncul ga berasa panasnya, tiket masuk bukan sekedar 30rb yaa per orang 🤭 …
english_translation: The price is worth it for all the natural beauty within, the place is really spacious, cool and pleasant even when the sun is out, you don't feel the heat. The entrance ticket isn't just 30 thousand per person 🤭 ...
summary: The attraction offers a spacious and pleasantly cool environment, allowing visitors to comfortably enjoy its natural beauty even on sunny days. Access requires an entrance fee greater than 30,000 per person.

text:
Tempat outbond yang super keren
Selama outbond nanti akan diberikan gelang dengan 3 tiket permainan. Bisa untuk flying fox, panjat tebing, meniti tali
Super challenging sekali, dan yang pasti aman karena sudah ditangani profesional
Spot foto alam juga sangat keren
Wajib kesini dengan rekan kerja untuk tim building
english_translation:
A super cool outbound location
During the outbound, you will be given a bracelet with 3 game tickets. It can be used for flying fox, rock climbing, and rope traversing.
It's super challenging, and definitely safe because it's handled by professionals.
The natural photo spots are also very cool.
Must come here with colleagues for team building.
summary: This outbound location offers professionally supervised, challenging activities like flying fox, rock climbing, and rope traversing. Access to three of these activities is granted via a ticketed bracelet system. The site also features natural photo spots and is recommended for team-building purposes.

text: Tempat parkir luas,ada masjid. Kalo kesulitan mengambil foto banyak akang yang jualan disana siap membantu
english_translation: Spacious parking lot, there is a mosque. If you have trouble taking photos, there are many friendly vendors there ready to help.
summary: This tourist attraction offers convenient accessibility with a spacious parking lot and includes a mosque as a key facility. Visitors can also engage in photography, with helpful on-site vendors available to provide assistance.

text: Tempatnya menarik harga tiketnya murah banyak spot foto yang bagus juga,  cocok juga buat bawa anak anak tapi harus aga di awasi takutnya metikin bunga
english_translation: The place is interesting, the ticket price is cheap, there are also many good photo spots. It's also suitable for bringing children, but they need to be supervised a bit, lest they pick the flowers.
summary: This affordable, family-friendly attraction offers numerous photo opportunities. While suitable for children, they require close supervision to protect the site's flowers.

text: Pokonya harus cobain ke tempat ini, fasilitas dan pelayanan dari para petugasnya bagus banget, siap membantu kita contohnya saat ingin berfoto👍👍👍 ga nyesel deh kesini malahan pengen balik lagi. Saat hujan pun sudah ada payung yang mereka sediakan …
english_translation: You absolutely have to try this place. The facilities and service from the staff are amazing. They are always ready to help, for example, when you want to take photos 👍👍👍 You won't regret coming here, in fact, you'll want to come back again. Even when it rains, they have umbrellas available...
summary: This attraction provides excellent facilities and highly praised staff service. The staff is noted for being helpful with activities like photo-taking, and the site is well-equipped for inclement weather, offering amenities such as umbrellas.

text:
Tempatnya seru, ada jembatan gantung, kastil, dan tempat iconic lainnya
Banyak spot foto yang oke..

Sayang tiket terusannya lumayan mahal.. Kalo yang bareng keluarga besar agak menguras dompet
english_translation:
The place is fun, there's a suspension bridge, a castle, and other iconic spots.
Lots of great photo spots.

It's a shame the entrance fee is quite expensive. If you're coming with a big family, it can be a drain on the wallet.
summary: This attraction features a castle, a suspension bridge, and other photogenic locations. However, the high entrance fee can make it an expensive outing, particularly for large families.

text: Gunung putri lembang ini tidak jauh dari kota Bandung. Hanua saja jika ingin datang ketempat ini sebaiknya pagi hari untuk menghindari macet. Selain itu datang dipagi hari lebih menyenangkan, karena kita bisa menikmati pemandangan yg luar biasa indah dan menghirup udara yg segar.
english_translation: This Lembang mountain area is not far from Bandung city. However, if you want to come here, it's best to come in the morning to avoid traffic jams. Besides, coming in the morning is more pleasant because we can enjoy the incredibly beautiful scenery and breathe the fresh air.
summary: Located near Bandung, this mountain attraction is best visited in the morning to avoid traffic and to enjoy the scenic views and fresh air.

text: Cocok untuk liburan berasama keluarga maupun sahabat. Tempatnya luas. Ada beberapa tempat yg kalo mau masuk bayar lagi salah satunya kota mini. Kalo mau murah lebih baik include semua wahana yg ada. Kalo mau masuk floating markernya saja harga tiketnya 30.000
english_translation: Suitable for holidays with family or friends. The place is spacious. There are some places where you have to pay again to enter, one of them is the mini city. If you want it to be cheap, it's better to include all the existing rides. If you only want to enter the floating market, the ticket price is 30,000.
summary: This spacious attraction features multiple activities, such as a mini city and a floating market, with a tiered pricing system. Visitors can pay for individual areas separately or opt for a more cost-effective all-inclusive pass that covers all available rides.

text: Sanghyang Heuleut .. objek wisata alam yang menampilkan pemandangan suangai dan bebukitan..
english_translation: Sanghyang Heuleut... a natural tourist attraction featuring river and hill scenery...
summary: This natural attraction showcases scenic river and hill landscapes.

text: So beautiful. Ada flying fox, panahan. Sungai nya bagus, bisa buat mandi, dan yang paling bagus itu pemandangan waktu tracking ke curug tilu, meski curug tilu nya biasa aja, tp yg bagus itu waktu tracking nya. Ga terlalu jauh juga utk tracking, sekitar 2km, 30menitan. Bawa jaket anti air, karna sering hujan
english_translation: So beautiful. There's a flying fox, archery. The river is nice, good for swimming, and the best part is the view during the trek to Curug Tilu. Even though Curug Tilu itself is just okay, the trek is what's great. It's not too far for the trek, about 2km, 30 minutes. Bring a waterproof jacket, because it often rains.
summary: This attraction offers activities such as a flying fox, archery, and river swimming. The site is accessible via a relatively short and scenic 30-minute trek (approximately 2km) to a waterfall, which is noted as the main highlight. Due to frequent rain, visitors are advised to bring waterproof clothing.

text: Tempatnya indah cocok sekali untuk berfoto selfi,disini juga terdapat beberapa permainan ada 3 permainan,yaitu:Flyng Fox,Jembatan Gantung dan Turun Tebing harga tiket permainanya ada yang 15.000 hingga 25.000
english_translation: The place is beautiful, very suitable for taking selfies. There are also several games here, there are 3 games, namely: Flying Fox, Hanging Bridge and Cliff Descent. The ticket prices for the games range from 15,000 to 25,000.
summary: This scenic attraction, noted for its photo opportunities, features three paid adventure activities—a flying fox, a hanging bridge, and cliff descent—with individual ticket prices ranging from 15,000 to 25,000.

text: Tempatnya adem, sejuk tapi agak lelah yaa karna naik turun tanggaa. Pas kesini nyobain flying fox, jembatan tali, turun tebing. Terus juga ada kasih makan rusa, kelinci sama burung. Rekomen si buat yg mau liat hijaunya alam
english_translation: The place is cool and refreshing, but it's a bit tiring because of the stairs going up and down. When I came here, I tried the flying fox, rope bridge, and rappelling. There was also feeding deer, rabbits, and birds. Recommended for those who want to see the green nature.
summary: This nature attraction offers various activities, including adventure sports like a flying fox and rope bridge, as well as animal feeding. However, visitors should be aware that accessibility is physically demanding due to numerous stairs throughout the site.

text: Kebun Bunga begonia paling pas buat foto2 Krn byk tempat yg bagus buat di upload di Instagram. Warna bunganya juga cerah2. HTM nya 20rb. Kalau kesini dari Lembang cari angkot yg arah Maribaya
english_translation: The Begonia Flower Garden is perfect for taking photos because there are many good spots to upload on Instagram. The flower colors are also bright. The entrance fee is 20,000. If you're coming here from Lembang, look for a public minivan (angkot) going towards Maribaya.
summary: Ideal for photography with its vibrant flowers and photogenic spots, the Begonia Flower Garden charges a 20,000 entrance fee and is accessible from Lembang by public minivan.
